title: Anomaly Detection
objective: Detect unusual system, data, or AI behavior through statistical, heuristic, and machine learning models to prevent or mitigate emerging threats.

title: Continuous Monitoring
objective: Establish automated, continuous monitoring of security, privacy, and AI model performance to detect deviations, anomalous behaviors, or policy violations in real time.

title: IOC Detection
objective: Identify and respond to Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) that signal potential intrusion or malicious activity across enterprise and AI systems.

title: Incident Management
objective: Ensure rapid identification, containment, analysis, and recovery from security and AI-related incidents to reduce impact and recurrence.

title: Monitor Third Parties
objective: Continuously monitor vendor and partner ecosystems for cybersecurity, privacy, and AI compliance risks.

title: Performing Security Assessments
objective: Assess the effectiveness of controls through independent and systematic security testing across digital and AI environments.

title: Penetration Testing
objective: Simulate adversarial attacks to evaluate system and model resilience.

title: Vulnerability Testing
objective: Identify and mitigate exploitable weaknesses across systems, applications, and AI components.

title: Tabletop Exercises (BCDR)
objective: Test business continuity, disaster recovery, and incident response readiness through structured simulations.

title: Code Scanning
objective: Ensure application and AI codebases are free from known security defects and insecure configurations.

title: Threat Intelligence
objective: Integrate actionable threat intelligence into detection and defense programs to anticipate, contextualize, and mitigate evolving threats.
